title: What is wrong with my formula?

posts.author: JennyA (Jenny Anderson)
posts.cookedHtml:
I’m wondering what I’ve done wrong with my formula?

MINUS({Approved Project Budget},{Actual Spend})

Approved Project Budget is a number cell and Actual Spend is a mirror cell - is this because one of the cells is a mirror?

Is there any work around this?

Thanks

posts.author: GCavin (Gilles Cavin - Reinventing Formulas in monday.com)
posts.cookedHtml:
@JennyA

Just tested it on a board of mine and it works…

posts.author: GiannisKoukounas (Giannis Koukounas)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @JennyA ,

I also tested this exact scenario myself and it is working as intended.

Do the Approved Project Budget and Actual Spend columns have any values? Also did you try refreshing your page?

If the issue persists you should probably contact monday support, as this is something that should be working.

Please let me know if I can help you any other way.

Cheers,
Giannis, Implementation Consultant at thespelas.com

posts.author: JennyA (Jenny Anderson)
posts.cookedHtml: Hummm, it just doesn’t seem to work on my board - I’ll reach out directly to Monday support - thanks for the feedback.

posts.author: JennyA (Jenny Anderson)
posts.cookedHtml: Thanks, appreciate that - I’m going to reach out to Monday support as its just not working on mine.
